detectors.description: SUDO.remove_liq() (SUDO.sol#895-919) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.removeLiquidity(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH(),IERC20(pairAddress).balanceOf(_owner),0,0,_owner,block.timestamp) (SUDO.sol#899-915)
SUDO.add_liq() (SUDO.sol#729-763) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),_initialSupply * 45 / 100,0,0,_owner,block.timestamp) (SUDO.sol#745-759)

Reentrancy in SUDO.add_liq() (SUDO.sol#729-763):

	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(address(this),address(uniswapV2Router),_initialSupply) (SUDO.sol#741)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (SUDO.sol#953)
